Pandorum (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,330,853Details
International Box Office $6,702,578
Worldwide Box Office $17,033,431
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,344,010
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,451,335
Total $8,795,345
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,424,126 (42.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,506 opening theaters/2,506 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $16,474,266

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 25th, 2009 (Wide) by Overture Films
Video Release: January 19th, 2010 by Starz / Anchor Bay
MPA Rating: R For strong horror violence and language
Running Time: 108 minutes
Geographical setting: Outer Space
Plot point: Cannibalism, Faulty Memory, Mutants, Surprise Twist
Social setting: Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Overture Films, Constantin Film, Impact Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
